zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh I de Roucy於1090年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯盧希時，他的父親Ebles II de Ramerupt35歲，母親Sybille de Hauteville32歲。他於1117年與Richilde von Staufen結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1160年在法國皮卡迪艾斯盧希享年70歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh I de Roucy于1090年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯盧希时，他的父亲Ebles II de Ramerupt35岁，母亲Sybille de Hauteville32岁。他于1117年与Richilde von Staufen结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1160年在法国皮卡迪艾斯盧希享年70岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內萊姆斯。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh I de Roucy was born in 1090, in Roucy, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Ebles II de Ramerupt, was 35 and his mother, Sybille de Hauteville, was 32. He married Richilde von Staufen in 1117. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1160, in Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh I de Roucy est né en 1090, à Roucy, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Ebles II de Ramerupt, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Sybille de Hauteville, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Richilde von Staufen en 1117. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1160, à Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh I de Roucy 1090 in Roucy, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ebles II de Ramerupt 35 und seine Mutter Sybille de Hauteville 32. Er hat 1117 Richilde von Staufen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1160 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich und wurde in Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh I de Roucy è nato il nel 1090 nel Roucy, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Ebles II de Ramerupt, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Sybille de Hauteville, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Richilde von Staufen nel 1117. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1160, nel Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh I de Roucyが1090年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンロウシで生まれた時，父Ebles II de Rameruptは35歳，母Sybille de Hautevilleは32歳であった。1117年にRichilde von Staufenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1160年にフランスピカーディエイスンロウシで70歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンレイムズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh I de Roucy(이)가 1090년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 루시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ebles II de Ramerupt(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybille de Hauteville(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1117년 Richilde von Staufen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1160년 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 루시에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 레임스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh I de Roucy nasceu em 1090, em Roucy, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Ebles II de Ramerupt, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sybille de Hauteville, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Richilde von Staufen em 1117. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1160, em Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, França, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh I de Roucy родился в 1090 г. в местности роуси, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Ebles II de Ramerupt было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybille de Hauteville, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Richilde von Staufen в 1117 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1160 г. в местности роуси, эисн, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности римс, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh I de Roucy nació en 1090, en Roucy, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Ebles II de Ramerupt, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Sybille de Hauteville, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Richilde von Staufen en 1117. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1160, en Roucy, Aisne, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Reims, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
